role: Brigadier General; Budget and Finance Chief, Armed Forces (d. 31 March 2026)
bio: Jamshid Eshaghi served as a Brigadier General and chief of the Budget and Finance department of the Iranian Armed Forces. He was killed on 31 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 31 March 2026. Brigadier General, Budget and Finance Chief of Armed Forces.
